title: aglaia apiocarpa
intro: Aglaia apiocarpa, also known as the apiocarpa tree or Philippine aglaia, is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Aglaia apiocarpa include treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Aglaia apiocarpa can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and its bark, leaves, and roots are used in herbal preparations.
